mapper.select: select l.log_id, l.visit_id, l.action_type, l.from_status, l.to_status, l.operator_user_id, u.user_name as operator_user_name, l.operator_dept_id, d.dept_name as operator_dept_name, l.action_time, l.action_comment, l.create_by, l.create_time from fe_visit_apply_log l left join sys_user u on l.operator_user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on l.operator_dept_id = d.dept_id where l.visit_id = #{visitId} order by l.action_time asc, l.log_id asc
